            function is_browser() {
                return (
                    navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Chrome") !== - 1 ||
                    navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Opera") !== - 1 ||
                    navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Firefox") !== - 1 ||
                    navigator.userAgent.indexOf("MSIE") !== - 1 ||
                    navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Safari") !== - 1 ||
                    navigator.userAgent.indexOf("Edge") !== - 1
                );
            }

            function not_excluded_page() {
                return (
                    window.location.href.indexOf("/unsupported-browser/") === - 1 &&
                    document.title.toLowerCase().indexOf('page not found') === - 1
                );
            }

            if (is_browser() && ! window.atob && not_excluded_page()) {
                window.location = location.protocol + '//' + location.host + '/unsupported-browser/';
            }
        </script>

					Vegetarian
				</span>
</button>
<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-header-6826a119a95e7" class="c-accordion__content site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content" id="accordion-content-6826a119a95e8" role="tabpanel">

					Vegetarian: Contains no meat, fish, poultry, shellfish or products derived from these sources but may contain dairy or eggs
				</div>
</div>

<div class="c-accordion__row site-panel__diet-pref-row">

					Vegan
				</span>
</button>
<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-header-6826a119a95f2" class="c-accordion__content site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content" id="accordion-content-6826a119a95f3" role="tabpanel">
<div class="c-accordion__content-inner site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content-inner" data-autop="true" data-depth="0" data-index="1" data-livetext="" data-name="row_content">
					Vegan: Contains absolutely no animal or dairy products.
				</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="c-accordion__row site-panel__diet-pref-row">
<button aria-controls="accordion-content-6826a119a95f8" aria-expanded="false" aria-selected="false" class="c-accordion__header site-panel__diet-pref-header" data-index="2" id="accordion-header-6826a119a95f7" role="tab">

<span class="c-accordion__header-inner site-panel__diet-pref-header-inner" data-depth="0" data-index="2" data-livetext="" data-name="title">
					Made without Gluten-Containing Ingredients
				</span>
</button>
<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-header-6826a119a95f7" class="c-accordion__content site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content" id="accordion-content-6826a119a95f8" role="tabpanel">
<div class="c-accordion__content-inner site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content-inner" data-autop="true" data-depth="0" data-index="2" data-livetext="" data-name="row_content">
					Made without Gluten-Containing Ingredients: does not contain ingredients that are sources of gluten, but is prepared in an open kitchen where gluten is present.
				</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="c-accordion__row site-panel__diet-pref-row">
<button aria-controls="accordion-content-6826a119a95fd" aria-expanded="false" aria-selected="false" class="c-accordion__header site-panel__diet-pref-header" data-index="3" id="accordion-header-6826a119a95fc" role="tab">

<span class="c-accordion__header-inner site-panel__diet-pref-header-inner" data-depth="0" data-index="3" data-livetext="" data-name="title">
					In Balance
				</span>
</button>
<div aria-hidden="true" aria-labelledby="accordion-header-6826a119a95fc" class="c-accordion__content site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content" id="accordion-content-6826a119a95fd" role="tabpanel">
<div class="c-accordion__content-inner site-panel__diet-pref-acc-content-inner" data-autop="true" data-depth="0" data-index="3" data-livetext="" data-name="row_content">
					In Balance: Contains a balanced portion of whole grains, fresh fruits and vegetables, and lean protein with a minimum amount of healthy fat.
				</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="c-accordion__row site-panel__diet-pref-row">
<button aria-controls="accordion-content-6826a119a9601" aria-expanded="false" aria-selected="false" class="c-accordion__header site-panel__diet-pref-header" data-index="4" id="accordion-header-6826a119a9600" role="tab">

				</div>

owned food business using socially and/or
environmentally responsible practices.

<section class="panel s-wrapper site-panel site-panel--wysiwyg" data-index="13" data-js="panel" data-jump-nav-title="FOOD ALLERGIES" data-modular-content="" data-type="wysiwyg" data-url-key="food-allergies" id="food-allergies">
<div class="l-container">
<header class="s-header">
<h2 class="site-section__title h2" data-depth="0" data-index="0" data-livetext="" data-name="title">FOOD ALLERGIES</h2>
</header>
<div class="s-content site-panel__wysiwyg-section">
<div class="g-row g-row--flex g-row--center g-row--col-2--min-medium" data-depth="0" data-livetext="" data-name="columns">
<div class="c-card g-col g-col-style--white">
<div class="c-card__content">
<div class="c-card__desc">
<div class="t-content wysiwyg__content">
<h5>Serving Students with Food Allergies and Celiac Disease</h5>
<p>The dining services team is well-trained in food allergy awareness and offer a number of options for students with food allergies and celiac disease. This includes communication about and modification to existing menu items, special preparation of menu items, and access to special products as agreed upon with students.</p>
<p>Daily menus for each café can be accessed at scudining.cafebonappetit.com. Menu items that are appropriate options for most students with celiac disease are labeled as “made without gluten-containing ingredients” and can be filtered to streamline searching using the dietary preferences filter. Top-9 allergens are included in menu names and/or descriptions whenever possible. For individuals needing additional assistance our team works directly with students to craft personalized meals meeting their dietary needs. For more on eating with a food allergy in our café, <a href="https://scudining.cafebonappetit.com/food-allergens/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">visit this page</a>. Further questions about ingredients can be answered by our trained managers/chefs on-site.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="c-card g-col g-col-style--white">
<div class="c-card__content">
<div class="c-card__desc">
<div class="t-content wysiwyg__content">
<figure class="wp-image wp-image--no-caption aligncenter"><img alt="" class="wp-image-15932 size-full" decoding="async" fetchpriority="high" height="1333" src="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/358/2022/02/6-allergens-12321-9-4.jpg" width="1999"/></figure><p><br>
For questions about these services or to request food allergy accommodations, students should contact:</br></p>
<p>Harvey Smith, General Manager<br/>
(408) 554-5411<br/>
harvey.Smith@cafebonappetit.com</p>
<p>Office of Accessible Education<br/>
(408) 554-4109<br/>
oae@scu.edu</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</section>

<section class="panel s-wrapper site-panel site-panel--wysiwyg" data-index="16" data-js="panel" data-jump-nav-title="About Your Food" data-modular-content="" data-type="wysiwyg" data-url-key="about-your-food" id="about-your-food">
<div class="l-container">
<header class="s-header">
<h2 class="site-section__title h2" data-depth="0" data-index="0" data-livetext="" data-name="title">Eat Right — For You</h2>
</header>
<div class="s-content site-panel__wysiwyg-section">
<div class="g-row g-row--flex g-row--center g-row--col-3--min-medium" data-depth="0" data-livetext="" data-name="columns">
<div class="c-card g-col g-col-style--white">
<header class="c-card__header">
<div>
<figure class="c-card__img">
<img alt="A composed salad of a variety of vegetables, greens, rice, and nuts." class="" sizes="(min-width: 1260px) 1260px, 100vw" src="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/iStock-1047798886_eat-right-for-you-wellness_1200px-640x480.jpg" srcset="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/iStock-1047798886_eat-right-for-you-wellness_1200px-640x480.jpg 640w 480h, 
https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/iStock-1047798886_eat-right-for-you-wellness_1200px-760x570.jpg 760w 570h, 
https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/iStock-1047798886_eat-right-for-you-wellness_1200px-1070x800.jpg 1070w 800h">
</img></figure>
</div>
</header>
<div class="c-card__content">
<h3 class="c-card__title">

	Wellness

</h3>
<div class="c-card__desc">
<div class="t-content wysiwyg__content">
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">When it comes to wellness, Bon Appétit’s focus is on simple, delicious food — that happens to be good for you. To support long-term health, we are <a href="/wellness/#plant-forward">bringing more plants to menus</a> every day in a craveable way, while emphasizing healthy cooking techniques. When healthy food tastes good, nourishing your body and mind becomes the easy choice.</span></p>
</div>
</div>
<a class="c-card__btn c-btn-text" href="/wellness/well-being-commitments/#ourpromise">
<span class="c-btn__text">Our wellness commitments</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="c-card g-col g-col-style--white">
<header class="c-card__header">
<div>
<figure class="c-card__img">
<img alt="Nine ramekins filled with ingredients." class="" sizes="(min-width: 1260px) 1260px, 100vw" src="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2023/07/7-allergens-333-9-640x480.jpg" srcset="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2023/07/7-allergens-333-9-640x480.jpg 640w 480h, 
https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2023/07/7-allergens-333-9-760x570.jpg 760w 570h, 
https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2023/07/7-allergens-333-9-1070x802.jpg 1070w 802h">
</img></figure>
</div>
</header>
<div class="c-card__content">
<h3 class="c-card__title">

	Food Allergies

</h3>
<div class="c-card__desc">
<div class="t-content wysiwyg__content">
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">We serve thousands of guests with food allergies and sensitivities safely in our cafés every day. Our chefs, managers, and dietitians work closely with our food-allergic guests to create reasonable solutions to help them eat what they love. If you have questions about eating for your dietary needs in our cafés, reach out to us: we’ll gladly meet with you.</span></p>
</div>
</div>
<a class="c-card__btn c-btn-text" href="/food-allergens/">
<span class="c-btn__text">Food allergies &amp; sensitivities</span>
</a>
</div>
</div>
<div class="c-card g-col g-col-style--white">
<header class="c-card__header">
<div>
<figure class="c-card__img">
<img alt="A person holds a wooden box filled with freshly picked vegetables in a garden." class="" sizes="(min-width: 1260px) 1260px, 100vw" src="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/Farm-fresh-veggies-500210894_2122x1416_v2_1200px-640x480.jpg" srcset="https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/Farm-fresh-veggies-500210894_2122x1416_v2_1200px-640x480.jpg 640w 480h, 
https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/Farm-fresh-veggies-500210894_2122x1416_v2_1200px-760x570.jpg 760w 570h, 
https://images.media.cafebonappetit.com/uploads/sites/2/2019/08/Farm-fresh-veggies-500210894_2122x1416_v2_1200px-1070x800.jpg 1070w 800h">
</img></figure>
</div>
</header>
<div class="c-card__content">
<h3 class="c-card__title">

	Sustainability

</h3>
<div class="c-card__desc">
<div class="t-content wysiwyg__content">
<p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Wellness also includes the health of the animals, the workers, the community, and the Earth. They’re all connected. Bon Appétit has been committed to “food service for a sustainable future” for decades, and we’ve led the food service industry in tackling many important issues, such as cage-free eggs, antibiotics in animal production, and farmworker rights.</span></p>
</div>

<script>
	jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
		var cafe_select = $('#bamco-newsletter-subscription-cafes');
		cafe_select.select2({width: '100%'});
		cafe_select.bind( 'change', function( event ) {
			if ( typeof(event.added) == 'undefined' ) {
				return;
			}
			if ( event.added.id == 'all' ) {
				unselect_every_option_but_all();
			} else {
				unselect_all_option();
			}
		});
		var unselect_every_option_but_all = function() {
			cafe_select.select2('val', ['all']);
		};
		var unselect_all_option = function() {
			var val = cafe_select.val();
			var new_val = [];
			for ( var i = 0 ; i < val.length ; i++ ) {
				if ( val[i] != 'all' ) {
					new_val.push(val[i]);
				}
			}
			if ( val.length != new_val.length ) {
				cafe_select.select2('val', new_val);
			}
		};
	});
</script>

<script>

			jQuery(document).ready( function($) {

				$(document).on('click', '.acf-button[data-name="add"]', function () {

					/**
					 * The setTimeout is a hack.
					 * 
					 * The ".media-menu-item" elements are generated slightly after the
					 * click event. By waiting 100 milliseconds we're able to direct the user to the
					 * "Select Image" panel if it exists.
					 */
					setTimeout(function() {

						var search_text = "Select Image";

						/** http://stackoverflow.com/a/36054483/3059883 */
						var $search_tab = $( ".media-menu-item" ).filter( function () {
							return $( this ).text().toLowerCase().indexOf( search_text.toLowerCase() ) >= 0;
						}).first(); // Returns the first element that matches the text. You can return the last one with .last()

						if ($search_tab.length > 0) {
							$search_tab.trigger( 'click' );

							$("iframe").load(function() {
								$(this).contents().find('.media-sidebar').addClass('open-featured');
							});
						}

					}, 100);

				});
			});
		</script>

<script>
        if (undefined !== window.jQuery) {
            jQuery(document).ready(function ($) {
                if (screen.width < 1000) {
                    $('.slick-carousel').slick({
                        infinite: true,
                        slidesToShow: 1,
                        slidesToScroll: 1,
                    });
                } else {
                    const slider = $('.slick-carousel').slick({
                        infinite: true,
                        slidesToShow: 3,
                        slidesToScroll: 3,
                    });
					// Improve accessibility on wellness slick carousel
					slider.each((ix, el) => {
						const fixTrackRole = sliderEl => {
							const track = sliderEl.querySelector('.slick-track');
							if(track){
								track.removeAttribute('role');
							}
						}
						const fixSlidesAriaHidden = sliderEl => sliderEl.querySelectorAll('.slick-slide').forEach((slide, ix) => {
							const visible = slide.classList.contains('slick-active')
							slide.setAttribute('aria-hidden', !visible);
							slide.setAttribute('tabindex', visible ? '0' : '-1');
						});
						const fixSlidesRole = sliderEl => sliderEl.querySelectorAll('.slick-slide').forEach((slide, ix) => {
							slide.removeAttribute('aria-describedby');
							slide.removeAttribute('role');
						});

						fixTrackRole(el);
						fixSlidesAriaHidden(el);
						fixSlidesRole(el);

						$(el).on('afterChange', (event, slick) => {
							setTimeout(() => {
								fixTrackRole(el);
								fixSlidesAriaHidden(el);
								fixSlidesRole(el);
							}, 200);
						});
					})
                }
            });
        }
    </script>

           return function() {                var context = this, args = arguments;                var later = function() {                    timeout = null;                    if ( !immediate ) func.apply( context, args );                };                var callNow = immediate && !timeout;                clearTimeout( timeout );                timeout = setTimeout( later, wait );                if ( callNow ) func.apply( context, args );
